name: Pre-existing back pain worsened by forklift crash, do I get benefits?
description: Yes for aggravation—doctor must link to accident.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing back pain worsened by forklift crash, do I get benefits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for aggravation—doctor must link to accident.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions.** Prove accident worsened it.[3][5] Key factors: Doctor opinion linking flare-up; avoid 'idiopathic' denial. Full records essential. Lawyer counters insurer reductions.
